title: scutellaria grandiflora
intro: Scutellaria grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Scutellaria grandiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Scutellaria grandiflora can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
